summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Partner Monthly Invoice System completed. All 28 tests passed covering: waivers CRUD (6 tests), store rates management (6 tests), invoice generation with PDF (8 tests), invoice status updates (6 tests), and waiver logic verification (1 test) + cleanup (1 test). The system correctly handles waiver creation/deletion, per-store rate overrides, invoice generation with line items, duplicate invoice prevention (409), PDF generation, and status transitions (draft→sent→paid/overdue/cancelled).
critical_code_review_comments: Waiver expiry logic (lines 54-55 in partner_invoices.py) correctly handles timezone-aware and naive datetime comparisons
Invoice generation (lines 153-277) properly calculates line items with waiver logic - waived stores show $0 amount but retain rate visibility
Duplicate invoice prevention (lines 174-179) correctly returns 409 if invoice exists for same partner+period
PDF generation (lines 280-414) uses fpdf2 and includes waiver notes in the PDF output
Scheduler job (lines 849-863, 967-973) runs on 1st of month at 6:30 UTC to generate invoices for previous month
seed_data_creation: Created test waivers and invoices for periods 2026-05 and 2026-06 (marked as cancelled after testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Invoice System fully tested. All endpoints working: POST/GET/DELETE waivers, GET/PUT store-rates, POST generate invoice, GET list/detail/pdf, PATCH status. Waiver logic correctly zeroes line item amounts while keeping stores visible. PDF generation works with fpdf2. Scheduler job configured for 1st of month at 6:30 UTC. Resend email will fail without valid API key but invoice generation/PDF still works (MOCKED). Test invoices for periods 2026-05 and 2026-06 exist in DB (cancelled status).

waivers.POST /api/admin/partner-invoices/waivers: PASS - creates waiver with optional expiry
waivers.GET /api/admin/partner-invoices/waivers/: PASS - lists waivers with expired flag
waivers.DELETE /api/admin/partner-invoices/waive: PASS - removes waiver, returns 404 for invalid ID

store_rates.GET /api/admin/partner-invoices/store-ra: PASS - returns stores with billing_rate and billing_package
store_rates.PUT /api/admin/partner-invoices/store-ra: PASS - sets/clears rate override, returns 400 for empty body, 404 for invalid store

invoice_generation.POST /api/admin/partner-invoices/generat: PASS - generates invoice with line items and PDF
invoice_generation.GET /api/admin/partner-invoices/list/{pa: PASS - returns invoice list with summary fields
invoice_generation.GET /api/admin/partner-invoices/detail/{: PASS - returns full invoice with line_items

waiver_logic.Waived store in invoice: PASS - shows waived=true, amount=$0, rate preserved

scheduler.monthly_partner_invoices job: CONFIGURED - runs on 1st of month at 6:30 UTC

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Will fail without valid API key but invoice generation works
